# thermal-management-mcp

> thermal-management-mcp — MCP server by MEOK AI Labs.

MCP server by MEOK AI Labs. Framework: fastmcp. Transport: stdio.

## Tools
- simulate_marangoni_flow
- calculate_capillary_limit

## Install
```
pip install thermal-management-mcp
```

## Links
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/thermal-management-mcp/
- Docs: https://meok.ai
